1000642129.korean: 정말로 아름다워요, 이터니티 양. 분명 사령관의 마음에도 쏙 들 거예요.

1000642131.english: Thank you. I was definitely passive.

1000642132.english: I thought that in the distant future, after you, my master, have passed away, I would spend an eternity with you...
1000642132.korean: 먼 훗날, 주인님께서 돌아가신 뒤엔 영겁의 시간을 저와 함께 보내게 된다고 생각해서...

1000642133.english: I was just waiting for that time and didn't think about the present world.
1000642133.korean: 그 때만 기다릴 뿐, 현세를 생각하지 않았어요.

1000642136.english: I've decided. Even in this life, I will build memories with my master.

1000642137.english: Thank you both. I'll definitely repay you later if I get the chance.
1000642137.korean: 두 분 모두 감사합니다. 나중에 기회가 된다면 반드시 보답할게요.

1000642141.english: Um... It's not like something's going to go wrong or anything, is it...?
1000642141.korean: 저... 뭔가 문제가 생긴다거나 그런 건 아니겠죠...?

1000642142.english: More precisely, it's the safety of the first customer.

1000642143.english: Miss Eternity is a very passive person, so she wouldn't do something like that.
1000642143.korean: 이터니티 양은 굉장히 수동적인 분이니, 그런 일을 저지르지는 않을 거예요.

1000642144.english: And thanks to Miss BoRyeon, I've started thinking about the present instead of the afterlife, haven't I?
1000642144.korean: 그리고 보련 양 덕분에 사후가 아닌 지금을 생각하게 됐잖아요?

1000642145.english: Oh, come on, how could that be because of me? It's all thanks to Audrey.
1000642145.korean: 에이~ 그게 어떻게 저 덕분이겠어요. 전부 오드리님 덕분이죠~

1000642146.english: Haha, that's a nice thing to say.

1000642147.english: So, anyway, in the end... Isn't our ultimate goal the same?
1000642147.korean: 그래서 말인데요, 결국... 저희 둘의 지향점은 결국 같은 것 아닐까요?

1000642150.english: Actually, what I was originally preparing wasn't a fashion show.
1000642150.korean: 사실, 원래 준비하던 건 패션쇼가 아니었거든요.

1000642152.english: Heh heh, it's summer, isn't it? That means...

1000642154.english: I'll prepare waterproof makeup and props~!

1000642155.english: It's great that artists can understand each other so well.
1000642155.korean: 역시 아리스트 끼리는 말이 잘 통해서 좋네요.

1000642156.english: Heh heh heh... I'm looking forward to my brother's reaction!

1000642157.english: I was looking at the participants slyly, and then suddenly! What if I pounce on you~?
1000642157.korean: 참가자분들을 음흉하게 보다가 확~! 덮쳐버리면 어떡하죠~?

1000642158.english: Hmm. It's not entirely impossible. The commander is secretly a man who follows his instincts.
1000642158.korean: 흠. 그럴 가능성도 없지는 않아요. 사령관은 은근히 본능에 충실한 남자니까.

1000642161.korean: 오르카 호의 첫 번째 수영복 콘테스트를.

1000642162.english: The scorching sun and golden beach. And even the crew members happily enjoying their vacation. It is the perfect picture of a summer holiday.
1000642162.korean: - 작렬하는 태양과 황금빛 해변. 그리고 즐겁게 휴가를 즐기는 대원들까지. 바람직한 여름 휴가의 모습이다.

1000642164.english: I am regretting that I decided to relax under a parasol on the beach to get into the summer vacation mood.
1000642164.korean: - 여름 휴가 분위기를 내기 위해 해변에 설치된 파라솔에서 쉬기로 한 것을 후회하는 중이다.

1000642165.english: I received a report that hot spring water is flowing underground due to a nearby volcano; could that be the reason? It doesn't seem to be just the weather.
1000642165.korean: - 근처에 있는 화산 때문에 지하에 온천수가 흐른다고 보고 받았었는데, 그것 때문일까? 단순히 날씨 탓만은 아닌 것 같다.

1000642166.english: It's been a long time since I finished the shaved ice Aurora left.
1000642166.korean: - 아우로라가 주고 간 빙수도 이미 다 먹은지 오래.

1000642167.english: Just as I grabbed my mini fan—my lifeline—and was about to stand up, a team member who looked even hotter than me appeared staggering like a mirage.
1000642167.korean: - 생명줄인 미니 선풍기를 챙겨서 일어나려는 순간, 나보다도 더 더워보이는 대원이 신기루처럼 비틀거리며 나타났다.

1000642169.english: Have you ever heard the expression "Butterfly Dream"? It refers to contemplating whether the concubine is a butterfly in a dream, or whether the butterfly in the dream is the concubine.
1000642169.korean: 호접지몽이란 말을 들어본 적이 있더냐. 첩이 꿈 속의 나비인지, 꿈 속의 나비가 첩인지에 대해 사유하는 말이다.

1000642170.english: However... in the end, to prove that one is oneself, one would need a truth that no one can deny.
1000642170.korean: 허나... 결국 자신이 자신이란 것을 증명하기 위해선, 그 누구도 부정할 수 없는 진실이 필요할 터.

1000642171.english: The concubine thinks... Therefore, the concubine exists...

1000642172.english: In other words, the concubine is the god of this world. It is the concubine existing in the material world who contemplates the non-material.
1000642172.korean: 즉, 첩은 이 세상의 신이다. 물질 세계에 존재하는 첩이, 비물질에 대해 사유하는 것이니라.

1000642173.english: The material world moves according to the concubine's thoughts...!
1000642173.korean: 첩의 생각에 따라, 물질 세계가 움직이는 것이니라...!

1000642174.english: That's right. The concubine... *hiccup*. was a god...!

1000642177.english: Poi waved his hand from behind Hirume, who was staggering along with a flushed face.
1000642177.korean: - 얼굴을 발갛게 물들인채 비틀비틀 걸어오는 히루메의 뒤에서 포이가 손을 흔들었다.

1000642178.english: Kya-ha, my dear~ I knew you would be here.
1000642178.korean: 꺄핫, 그대여~ 첩은 그대가 여기 있을 줄 알았다.

1000642179.english: Is there anything you desire? The concubine, the god of this world, will grant whatever you wish.
1000642179.korean: 원하는 것이 있느냐? 이 세계의 신인 첩이 무엇이든지 들어주겠다.

1000642181.english: Well, I guess that's how it is.

1000642182.english: Nya ha ha. Don't worry about the drunkard. Instead, Poi brought a very refreshing cocktail for Master before we sortie♡
1000642182.korean: 냐하핫. 주정뱅이는 신경쓰지 마세요. 그 대신 포이, 출격하기 전에 주인님을 위해서 아~주 시원한 칵테일을 한 잔 가져왔거든요♡

1000642183.english: What do you mean by bad news! How can you speak so harshly!
1000642183.korean: 안 좋은 일이라니! 어찌 말을 그리 험하게 하느냐!

1000642184.english: I... I have just returned from performing a shamanic song to ward off evil spirits for the one with whom I will spend my life!
1000642184.korean: 첩은... 첩과 백년해로할 그이를 위해 반나절간 액막이의 무가를 추고 왔거늘!

1000642185.english: And then... hiccup. While looking for him... I drank some very sweet cold water...
1000642185.korean: 그리고 나서... 딸꾹. 그이를 찾다가... 아~주 달콤한 냉수를 마셨는데...

1000642187.english: Turning my head to follow Poi's gaze, I saw beer bottles in ice boxes placed all over the beach.
1000642187.korean: - 포이의 시선을 따라 고개를 돌려보니, 해변 곳곳에 놓인 아이스박스에 담겨있는 맥주병들이 보였다.

1000642189.english: Surely, wandering through this scorching hell... hiccup. he must be longing for his concubine...
1000642189.korean: 필시 이 작열지옥 속을 헤매며... 딸꾹. 첩을 그리워하고 있을 터인데...

1000642191.english: Oh my...! We have finally met...!

1000642193.english: As Hirume ran over and hugged me, I could feel the intense heat.
1000642193.korean: - 도도도 달려온 히루메가 안겨들자 열기가 확 느껴졌다.

1000642194.english: Hehehe... You know very well that foxes have a high body temperature, don't you?
1000642194.korean: 에헤헤... 여우는 체온이 높다는 것을 익히 알지 않느냐.

1000642195.english: Was what you said about liking the warmth of a concubine... perhaps a lie...?
1000642195.korean: 첩은 따뜻해서 좋다고 했던 말은... 혹시 거짓이었느냐...?

1000642197.english: Mmm... I don't want to. I will stay here.

1000642200.english: I picked up Hirume, who was slumped over halfway in my arms, and laid her on the mat.
1000642200.korean: - 내게 반쯤 안긴 상태로 축 늘어진 히루메를 안아올려 돗자리에 눕혔다.

1000642201.english: While I was setting up the mini fan next to it, I felt a tingling sensation in the back.
1000642201.korean: - 그 옆에 미니 선풍기를 세워주는 동안, 등 뒤가 찌릿거렸다.

1000642203.english: Poi was planning to just quietly watch from here...

1000642204.english: Poi, who plopped down on the beach chair I was sitting on, continued speaking nonchalantly.
1000642204.korean: - 내가 앉아있던 비치 체어에 척하니 걸터앉은 포이가 천연덕스럽게 말을 이었다.

1000642205.english: You don't need to worry about Poi~ The bothersome cat will just quietly squat down~
1000642205.korean: 포이는 신경쓰지 않으셔도 괜찮아요~ 귀찮은 고양이는 얌.전.히 찌그러져 있을테니까요~

1000642206.english: Judging by his condition, it seems that coaxing him as usual won't work at all.
1000642206.korean: - 상태를 보아하니 평소처럼 달래서는 씨알도 먹히지 않을 것 같다.

1000642207.english: - I need to use a slightly different method... yeah.

1000642210.english: Hehe... Master, you're looking forward to Poi's annoying swimsuit?
1000642210.korean: 헤에... 주인님께서 귀찮은 포이의 수영복을 기대하신다구요?

1000642211.english: Nya ha ha, that can't be true, can it?

1000642214.english: I pushed Poi, who was sitting on a beach chair, over, and whispered softly from a distance where our noses almost touched.
1000642214.korean: - 비치체어에 앉아있던 포이를 밀어 쓰러트리고, 코가 맞닿을 거리에서 작게 속삭였다.

1000642216.english: Poi, who had been looking up at me with a blank expression while twisting his body for a while, soon returned to his usual smiling face.
1000642216.korean: - 한동안 몸을 꼬며 멍한 표정으로 나를 올려다 보던 포이는 곧 평소의 웃음기 섞인 얼굴로 돌아왔다.

1000642217.english: Nya ha ha. Since Master says so, even Poi can't help it.
1000642217.korean: 냐하핫. 주인님이 그렇게까지 말씀하시는데~ 포이도 어쩔 수 없네요.

1000642218.english: As I pulled away, Poi lay down like a cat and stretched.
1000642218.korean: - 내가 몸을 떼자 포이는 고양이처럼 엎드려서 기지개를 켰다.

1000642219.english: - No, it is a cat. Judging by its fickle personality...
1000642219.korean: - 아니, 고양이가 맞지. 변덕스러운 성격을 보면...

1000642220.english: Okay then, Poi, just a moment before I go♡

1000642221.english: Poi snuggled into my arms in an instant and rubbed his face against my chest.
1000642221.korean: - 순식간에 품에 파고든 포이가 얼굴을 내 가슴팍에 비볐다.

1000642222.english: Poi, having finished the marking that Ferro sometimes does—or to be precise, does unwittingly and then feels embarrassed about—pulled his body away with satisfaction.
1000642222.korean: - 페로도 가끔씩 하는, 정확히는 자기도 모르게 하고 나서 부끄러워하는 마킹을 끝마친 포이가 만족스럽게 몸을 뗐다.

1000642223.english: Nya ha ha, you know. Master...

1000642225.english: After Poi left with a shocking declaration, I slumped onto the mat.
1000642225.korean: - 충격적인 선언을 남기고 포이가 떠난 뒤, 돗자리에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000642227.english: He held Hirume's hand as she entangled her fingers in her sleep and lay down beside the thick ball of tail.
1000642227.korean: - 잠결에 손가락을 얽는 히루메의 손을 마주 잡아주며 풍성한 꼬리 뭉치 옆에 몸을 뉘였다.

1000642228.english: I decided to just laze around until I heard the broadcast announcing the start of the Steel Line Online tournament from afar.
1000642228.korean: - 멀리서 스틸라인 온라인 대회의 시작을 알리는 방송 소리가 들려올 때까지 적당히 빈둥대기로 했다.

1000642229.english: It's an upset. To think these two would face off in the qualifiers!

1000642230.english: The teams formed separately by the 2nd and 3rd ranked players of the season participated in this Steel Line online competition and will face off in the league match.
1000642230.korean: 이번 스틸라인 온라인 경연대회에 시즌 랭킹 2, 3위가 참여해 따로 꾸린 팀이 리그전에서 맞붙게 됐습니다.

1000642231.english: Which of the two do you think has the upper hand? What do you think, Commentator Yumi?
1000642231.korean: 과연 둘 중 어느 쪽이 우위일까요? 유미 해설 위원께서는 어떻게 생각하시죠?

1000642232.english: That is a very difficult question. First of all, Leanne, the captain of the City Guard team, is the player who best fits the word "all-rounder."
1000642232.korean: 굉장히 어려운 질문이네요. 일단 시티가드 팀의 주장인 리앤 선수는 만능이란 단어에 가장 걸맞는 선수예요.

1000642234.english: There isn't a single character it can't handle, ranging from damage, tanking, and healing to main and sub roles. On top of that, its fantastic DPI adjustments create variables even in tense situations.
1000642234.korean: 딜, 탱, 힐은 물론 메인에서 서브까지 못하는 캐릭터가 없어요. 거기에 환상적인 DPI 조정으로 긴박한 상황에서도 변수를 창출합니다.

1000642235.english: However, this player's true value lies in her shotcalling. It is easy to get lost in tunnel vision during a game, but Leanne has such a wide field of vision that it feels like she is right on top of the enemy's head.
1000642235.korean: 하지만 이 선수의 진가는 바로 오더인데요, 게임 중 터널 시야에 빠지기 쉬운데 리앤 선수는 상대 머리 꼭대기에 있는 것처럼 시야가 넓거든요?

1000642236.english: It will be very tricky for the opposing team!
1000642236.korean: 상대하는 적팀 입장에서는 굉장히 까다로울 겁니다!

1000642237.english: But! Alexandra's eternal disciple, the self-proclaimed special agent of Agency 080, and the troublemaker team assembled by Tomo-chan are no pushovers!
1000642237.korean: 하지만! 알렉산드라님의 영원한 제자, 끝나지 않는 보충수업, 080기관의 자칭 특급요원, 토모양이 꾸린 악동팀도 만만치 않아요!

1000642238.english: Tomo, the captain of the Blue Team, has a completely different style from Lianne Yang. Tomo hasn't used any characters at all so far other than T-2 Brownie.
1000642238.korean: 블루팀의 주장인 토모 선수는 리앤 양과 성향이 완전 달라요. 토모 선수는 여태까지 T-2 브라우니 말곤 사용한 캐릭터가 아예 없거든요.

1000642239.english: T-2 Brownie is indeed a jack-of-all-trades capable of tanking, dealing damage, and healing. However, in games, the word "jack-of-all-trades" is practically the same as saying something is ambiguous, you know?
1000642239.korean: T-2 브라우니가 탱, 딜, 힐이 다 되는 만능이긴 하죠. 하지만 게임에선 만능이란 단어는 애매하다는 말이나 마찬가지거든요?

1000642240.english: That is where Tomo's capabilities are revealed. He analyzes the compositions of his own team and the opposing team, and uses his animalistic intuition to select a flexible item build that wreaks havoc on the battlefield.
1000642240.korean: 거기서 토모 선수의 역량이 드러나는데요. 자기 팀과 상대 팀 구성을 보고, 동물적인 육감으로 유연한 아이템 트리를 선택해서 전장을 휘젓죠.

1000642241.english: As soon as I say this, the game is ready. Now it is time for each team's captain to come out and greet them.
1000642241.korean: 말씀드리는 순간 경기 준비 완료됐습니다. 이제 각 팀의 주장이 나와 인사를 나눌 차례네요.

1000642243.english: Seeing you face to face like this makes me miss you so much... but also feels a bit awkward for no reason.
1000642243.korean: 이렇게 마주보니까 굉장히 그리우면서... 괜히 낯간지럽네.

1000642245.english: To think you're already playing mind games. I almost fell for it.
1000642245.korean: 벌써부터 심리전을 걸다니. 하마터면 넘어갈 뻔했어.

1000642246.english: You were bothering me with the chat in-game, and you're doing the exact same thing here!

1000642248.english: It's just because I'm glad to see you. Whenever I see Tomo, old memories keep coming back to me, so I feel like talking to him.
1000642248.korean: 그냥 반가워서 그래. 토모만 보면 자꾸 옛 추억이 생각나서 말을 걸고 싶어져.

1000642250.english: I was in second place this season. Do you think you can beat me?
1000642250.korean: 이번 시즌엔 내가 2위였는데. 이길 수 있겠어?

1000642251.english: If only the last game had been counted, I would have been second place!

1000642252.english: Just in time, it was past midnight... It was the difference from last night.

1000642254.english: Anyway, looking at the results alone, I'm in second place, right? Right?
1000642254.korean: 어쨌든 결과만 놓고 보면 내가 2위네? 맞지?

1000642255.english: That's it. I just need to win now.
1000642255.korean: 됐어. 지금 내가 이기면 되는 거니까.

1000642257.english: Oh, right. I have a question. Can you answer it?
1000642257.korean: 아, 맞다. 한 가지 궁금한 게 있는데 대답해 줄 수 있어?

1000642258.english: You're going to ask when I'm going to flank again, aren't you! I'm not telling you this time!
1000642258.korean: 또 언제 플랭킹할 거냐고 물어볼 거지! 이번엔 말 안 해줄 거야!

1000642259.english: Ahaha. No, no. It's a simple question.

1000642261.english: What? I don't know about that.

1000642262.english: It's just fun. Playing games together, laughing, chatting... things like that.
1000642262.korean: 그냥 즐거울 뿐이야. 다 같이 게임하고, 웃고, 떠들고... 그런 거.

1000642263.english: Why are you suddenly asking that?

1000642267.english: Did I talk for too long? The organizing committee members say they don't have time.
1000642267.korean: 너무 오래 이야기했나? 준비위원분들이 시간 없다네.

1000642268.english: Let's make this a great match, Tomo. I look forward to working with you.

1000642270.english: Wait! Was T-2 Brownie really that good of a character? The viewers' perception of the tournament is going to change.
1000642270.korean: 아니! T-2 브라우니가 저렇게 좋은 캐릭터였나요? 대회를 보는 분들의 인식이 바뀌겠는데요.

1000642271.english: Even though I could handle all weapons, I was evaluated as not particularly outstanding because my proficiency was low. That was the prevailing perception.
1000642271.korean: 모든 무기를 다룰 수 있어도 숙련도가 낮아서 딱히 뛰어나지 않다는 평가를 들었죠. 그게 기존 인식이었어요.

1000642272.english: However, the brownie Tomo is using right now is completely different.
1000642272.korean: 그런데 지금 토모 선수가 사용하는 브라우니는 완전 달라요.

1000642273.english: By switching weapons every second and utilizing skills at the right moments, I am perfectly keeping an eye on the 'Indomitable Marie' played by Leanne!
1000642273.korean: 초 단위로 무기를 바꿔 적재적소에 스킬을 활용해, 리앤 선수가 플레이하는 '불굴의 마리'를 완벽하게 붙들고 있습니다!

1000642275.english: It's a base capture battle, so why are you holding onto the opponent...? We need to capture the base...?
1000642275.korean: 거점점령전인데 왜 상대방을 붙잡고 있는 거죠...? 거점을 뺏어야 하는데...?

1000642276.english: Is this a battle of pride between the ranked players? Calls are pouring in for Tomo from the Akdong Team to join team fights.
1000642276.korean: 랭커들간의 자존심 싸움인가요? 악동팀에서 토모 선수에게 한타 참여하라는 콜이 쏟아지고 있습니다.

1000642277.english: One thing is certain: the skills of these two players are incredible. When else would we get to enjoy such a visual feast?
1000642277.korean: 확실한 건 두 선수의 기량이 엄청나다는 겁니다. 저희가 또 언제 이런 눈호강을 해보겠습니까.

1000642278.english: Tomo's 'T-2 Brownie' blocks 'Indomitable Marie's' attack with foamed concrete. Simultaneously, a 140mm mortar fires at close range!
1000642278.korean: 토모 선수의 'T-2 브라우니', 발포 콘크리트로 '불굴의 마리'의 공격을 막아냅니다. 동시에 140mm 박격포 지근거리 발포!

1000642279.english: If you bombard them at close range, they'll take damage themselves!
1000642279.korean: 근접에서 포격하면 자기도 데미지를 입을 텐데요!

1000642280.english: The smoke screen effect has activated, making it difficult to see the situation inside the smoke. The fog has just cleared, but...?!
1000642280.korean: 연막 효과가 발동해서 연기 속 상황을 알기 힘듭니다. 막 안개가 걷혔는데...?!

1000642281.english: T-2 Brownie, close range on Indomitable Marie! Close range! With assault rifles in both hands! No way! No way!
1000642281.korean: T-2 브라우니, 불굴의 마리에게 초근접! 초근접해서! 양손에 돌격소총 들고! 설마! 설마아아아!

1000642282.english: Indiscriminate firing of ultimates! What?! You're saying you're going to take down Marie, the counter character, with Brownie?!
1000642282.korean: 궁극기 무차별 난사! 아니! 브라우니로 상성 캐릭터인 마리를 잡는다고요?!

1000642283.english: I can't believe it! Everyone knows that Indomitable Mari is a counter to T-2 Brownie!
1000642283.korean: 이럴 수가! 불굴의 마리가 T-2 브라우니의 상성이라는 것은 누구나 알고 있는 사실인데요!

1000642284.english: Unless there is a difference of one, no, two or three levels of skill, it would be absolutely impossible to overcome...!
1000642284.korean: 실력이 한 단계, 아니 두 세단계는 차이나지 않으면 절대로 극복이 불가능할텐데...!

1000642285.english: However! At the same time, the base is captured, and the match ends with a victory for the City Guard team!
1000642285.korean: 하지만! 그와 동시에 거점이 점령되며 시티가드 팀의 승리로 경기 마무리됩니다!

1000642286.english: Ah, Tomo, you're getting scolded by your teammates!
1000642286.korean: 아아, 토모 선수, 팀원들에게 혼나고 있어요!

1000642287.english: Although they lost, memorable moments were created starting from the qualifiers.

1000642288.english: We'll be back with the next match after showing you the highlights!
1000642288.korean: 경기 주요 장면 보내드리면서, 저희는 다음 경기와 함께 돌아올게요!

1000642293.english: Oh right, the event match was canceled.

1000642294.english: It can't be helped since the participation of the main special guest has become uncertain. I'm disappointed, too.
1000642294.korean: 주인공인 특별 게스트의 참여가 불투명하게 됐으니 어쩔 수 없죠. 저도 아쉬워요.

1000642295.english: You mean that big name of the deep sea, right? I know him. He's really famous, you know.
1000642295.korean: 심해의 네임드이신 그 분 말씀이시죠? 저도 알아요. 되게 유명하잖아요.

1000642296.english: I clearly understood that they expressed their intention to participate... Why do they say they can't come?
1000642296.korean: 분명 본인이 참여 의사를 밝힌 걸로 아는데... 왜 못 나오신대요?

1000642297.english: I heard he belongs to Steel Line and is currently undergoing hellish training...

1000642302.english: You know the Battalion Commander's personality! The Battalion is responsible... Training time is being extended...
1000642302.korean: 연대장님 성격 아시잖슴까! 연대 책임임다... 훈련시간 추가됨다...

1000642303.english: Even now, I'll... the mortar... Ow, hot!

1000642304.english: How, how did you train holding something like this?!
1000642304.korean: 이, 이런 걸 들고 어떻게 훈련 받으셨슴까?!

1000642305.english: Hang in there, Sergeant... You just have to hold on a little longer...
1000642305.korean: 병장님, 힘내세요... 조금만 더 버티면 돼요...

1000642310.english: You two collapsed because you trained while carrying heavy things; I cannot tolerate someone collapsing while holding the exact same rifle as me.
1000642310.korean: 두 분은 무거운 걸 지닌 채 훈련받아서 쓰러진 거지, 저랑 똑같은 소총 들고 쓰러지는 건 용납 못해요.

1000642314.english: Let's be together. Until the very end of this hell.

1000642315.english: Corporal, snap out of it! This place is already hell!
1000642315.korean: 상병님, 정신 차리십쇼! 여긴 이미 지옥임다!

1000642316.english: Who on earth said they wanted to do hell training during vacation...
1000642316.korean: 대체 누가 휴가때 지옥훈련을 하고 싶다고 해서...

1000642318.english: Why would I do something like this!

1000642319.english: Do Corporal Silky and Sergeant Ifrit look at me like that too? Were they suspicious?
1000642319.korean: 실키 상병님이랑 이프리트 병장님도 절 그런 눈으로 보심까? 의심하고 계셨던 검까!

1000642320.english: It’s unfair, you know. I had vacation plans too. I was planning to participate in the Steel Line Online tournament and win...
1000642320.korean: 억울하지 말임다, 저도 휴가계획이 있었슴다. 스틸라인 온라인 대회에 참가해 우승할 생각이었지 말임다...

1000642322.english: Please, come back as the angelic Corporal Leprechaun...!
1000642322.korean: 천사 같던 레프리콘 상병님으로 돌아오십쇼, 제발...!

1000642324.english: The officers are holding out too, so please stand up...

1000642326.english: Were the officers also undergoing training?!

1000642327.english: The regimental commander is personally in command, so how could the officers possibly back out?
1000642327.korean: 연대장님이 직접 지휘하고 계신데 간부들이라고 어떻게 빠질 수 있겠냐...

1000642328.english: I don't know if this will be any comfort, but... can you see?

1000642329.english: On the ankle... isn't it a sandbag?

1000642331.english: The number is increasing in proportion to the fallen soldiers... so get up... Ah!
1000642331.korean: 쓰러진 병사에 비례해 갯수가 추가되고 있으니까... 일어나... 앗!

1000642335.english: Are you supposed to lie to your superiors?

1000642337.english: It's tough. It must be tough.

1000642338.english: I understand. He probably wanted to rest a little during his vacation. Shamefully, the regimental commander felt the same way.
1000642338.korean: 이해한다. 휴가기간을 맞아 조금은 쉬고 싶었겠지. 부끄럽게도 연대장 또한 같은 생각이었다.

1000642339.english: In that sense, the proposal for this hell training was a fresh shock.
1000642339.korean: 그런 의미에서 이번 지옥훈련 발안은 신선한 충격이었다.

1000642340.english: To volunteer for training during vacation without being ordered... that spirit to restore lax military discipline.
1000642340.korean: 누가 명령하지 않아도 휴가기간에 훈련을 자처하다니... 해이해진 군기를 바로 잡자는 그 정신.

1000642341.english: I, Regimental Commander Red Hood, was moved by you all.

1000642342.english: Brownie... If you confess even now, I'll forgive you with a bob haircut...
1000642342.korean: 브라우니... 지금이라도 고백하면 조정간 단발로 용서해줄게요...

1000642343.english: I told you it wasn't me... What do I have to do for you to believe me...

1000642344.english: Where's the gnome...? Where did it go...?

1000642345.english: I applied to be a safety officer before the training schedule came out...

1000642346.english: Guys, let's be quiet so the battalion commander can rest, at least while he speaks...
1000642346.korean: 애들아, 연대장님 말씀하시는 동안에라도 쉴 수 있게 조용하자...

1000642347.english: It is rewarding to train with the soldiers for the first time in a long while. It would have been nice if Colonel Phoenix had come along, too.
1000642347.korean: 오래간만에 장병들과 함께 훈련하니 보람차군. 피닉스 대령도 같이 왔으면 좋았을 텐데.

1000642348.english: Sandbags on the Battalion Commander's ankles too...? Why did you attach so many?
1000642348.korean: 연대장님 발목에도 모래주머니가...? 왜 저리 많이 다셨슴까?

1000642349.english: The regimental commander kicked the stragglers' and officers' portions as well. Even though the officers told him to stop because it would hurt his health, he wouldn't listen.
1000642349.korean: 연대장님은 낙오된 병사랑 간부 몫까지 차셨다. 간부들이 몸 상한다고 말려도 듣질 않으시더라.

1000642350.english: He is someone who practices what he preaches himself—that a commander must train more harshly than anyone else... That is why the officers participate until they collapse.
1000642350.korean: 지휘관이라면 누구보다 가혹하게 훈련해야 한다고, 본인부터 실천하는 분이라... 그래서 간부들도 쓰러질 때까지 동참하고 있지.

1000642352.english: 40km sprint, 8 hours of PT exercises. These are the training methods I've been doing all along.

1000642353.english: I swear. Hell training will be conducted more thoroughly and intensely than the previous training.
1000642353.korean: 맹세하마. 지옥훈련은 앞선 훈련보다 더 철저하게, 강도 높게 진행될 거다.

1000642354.english: Gentlemen, are you ready to push beyond your limits?

1000642355.english: It's an enemy! It's the Iron Bug signal!

1000642356.english: I see. However, that area is under the jurisdiction of another unit.
1000642356.korean: 그렇군. 하지만 저 쪽은 타 부대의 관할이다.

1000642357.english: Enthusiasm is good, but trusting colleagues—

1000642359.english: Please postpone the hell training for a while!

1000642361.english: Regimental Commander, I'll go provide cover! Hell training is just for a moment!
1000642361.korean: 연대장님, 제가 엄호하러 가겠습니다! 지옥훈련은 잠시!

1000642362.english: Corporal Silky, did you pack the shells...?

1000642368.english: Okay. We'll resume as soon as the soldiers return.

1000642370.english: Did you just see the soldiers' intense camaraderie? To think the results of the hellish training are already showing.
1000642370.korean: 방금 병사들의 뜨거운 전우애를 보았나? 지옥훈련의 성과가 벌써 드러나다니.

1000642371.english: Just as an officer educates a soldier, a soldier must educate an officer. ...The contents of the manual are coming back to me vividly.
1000642371.korean: 장교가 병사를 교육하듯, 병사도 장교를 교육하는 법. ...교범 내용이 새록새록 떠오르는군.

1000642372.english: When you return, increase the training intensity threefold.

1000642374.english: Go quickly and help the soldiers. The battle is about to begin.
1000642374.korean: 어서 가서 병사들을 돕도록. 곧 전투가 시작되겠군.

1000642375.english: No, I will command it myself.

1000642377.english: Your passion, the regimental commander has taken note of it with his own two eyes.
1000642377.korean: 너희들의 열정, 연대장이 두 눈 똑똑히 새겼다.

1000642380.english: I tried to make it work somehow, but...

1000642382.english: Huh? No way... You're saying it's training all the time?

1000642383.english: That's too harsh... Sergeant, did you hear?

1000642387.english: I was planning to train only until tomorrow, but that was a weak thought.

1000642388.english: With your enthusiasm, even the entire summer vacation wouldn't be enough.
1000642388.korean: 너희들의 열정이라면 여름휴가 일정 내내 해도 부족하겠지.

1000642389.english: I may be a lacking battalion commander, but I'll stay with you until the end of my leave. Get up slowly.
1000642389.korean: 부족한 연대장이지만 휴가가 끝날 때까지만이라도 함께 하마. 슬슬 일어나라.

1000642396.english: If I had known you were there, I would have fought more cautiously. I apologize for not realizing it until it was too late. Are you hurt anywhere?
1000642396.korean: 계신 걸 알았다면 신중히 전투했을 텐데 늦게 알아채서 죄송합니다. 다친 덴 없으십니까?

1000642397.english: As you can see, I'm fine thanks to all of you.

1000642398.english: Soldiers, please receive. It's a refreshing drink and a fluffy towel!
1000642398.korean: 장병 여러분, 받으세요. 시원한 음료수와 뽀송뽀송한 타월이랍니다~

1000642399.english: I'm sorry, but the Steel Line unit is currently undergoing hellish training.

1000642400.english: Since you might relax during training, I'll just accept your kind thoughts.
1000642400.korean: 훈련간 긴장이 풀릴 수 있으니, 마음만 받도록-

1000642401.english: Wow, Colonel, aren't you eating? It's really refreshing!
1000642401.korean: 키야, 연대장님은 안 드심까? 진짜 시원하지 말임다!

1000642405.english: I picked up the brownie with two fingers...!

1000642406.english: Hey guys, hide what you're drinking quickly. For now, be nice to Brownie...
1000642406.korean: 얘들아, 마시던 거 빨리 숨겨라. 브라우니한테는 당분간 잘해주고...

1000642408.english: I'm sorry for making a fool of myself.

1000642409.english: We will accompany you to ensure you return safely. Where are you planning to go?
1000642409.korean: 안전하게 돌아갈 수 있도록 저희가 동행하겠습니다. 어디로 가실 예정이십니까?

1000642410.english: As for us, well, we're just... Oh, right.

1000642411.english: Audrey, you haven't told the Steel Line people yet, have you?
1000642411.korean: 오드리 님, 아직 스틸라인 분들에게는 말씀 안드렸었죠?

1000642413.english: We're planning to hold a swimsuit contest this time. Is there anyone who would like to participate?
1000642413.korean: 이번에 수영복 콘테스트를 열 예정이에요. 혹시 참가하고 싶으신 분 계신가요?

1000642414.english: If it's now, I can get support for my makeup and Audrey's swimsuit. The commander will also be observing.
1000642414.korean: 지금이라면 제 메이크업과 오드리 님의 수영복을 지원받을 수 있어요. 사령관님도 참관하실 예정이시구요.

1000642416.english: Your hair is very beautiful. Your cuticles aren't damaged, and even tho you're wearing a hat, you're very handsome.
1000642416.korean: 머릿결이 굉장히 고우시네요. 큐티클 손상도 없고, 모자를 쓰고 계셔서 그렇지 외모도 굉장히 수려하세요.

1000642417.english: And what about their lean physique? Beside unit training, do you also do Pilates or yoga?
1000642417.korean: 군살 없는 체형은 또 어떻고요. 부대 훈련 외에 필라테스나 요가도 하고 있죠?

1000642418.english: Your skin is quite oily, but you've managed it very well. Do you apply toner and essence carefully?
1000642418.korean: 피부에 유분이 많은데 관리를 굉장히 잘하셨네요. 토너랑 에센스를 꼼꼼히 바르시나봐요?

1000642420.english: Your hobby was beauty? That's great!

1000642421.english: This time, I'll do your makeup myself and share some insider tips that only professionals know. How is it? Participate in the swimsuit contest.
1000642421.korean: 이번 기회에 제가 직접 화장해드리면서 전문가만 아는 꿀팁을 알려드릴게요. 어떠세요? 수영복 콘테스트에 참여-

1000642424.english: Because I am the commander of the Steel Line.

1000642425.english: The hellish training that the unit members took the initiative to do. It doesn't make sense for the battalion commander to leave.
1000642425.korean: 부대원들이 솔선해서 하게된 지옥훈련. 연대장이 빠져서야 말이 되지 않-

1000642427.english: No matter what happens... Right, Sergeant Silky...?
1000642427.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도... 그렇지, 실키 상병...?

1000642428.english: Of course. Leave it to me, the Steel Line's quartermaster.

1000642429.english: Luckily, I have some cosmetics in stock that I received from the Sky Knights. I'll provide unlimited support.
1000642429.korean: 마침 스카이나이츠 분들께 받은 화장품 재고가 있어요. 무제한으로 지원해드릴게요.

1000642430.english: There's only one steel line, right? I'll help too!

1000642432.english: The battalion commander is already cool, beautiful, and... You are the perfect person to represent Steel Line.
1000642432.korean: 연대장님은 그 자체로 충분히 멋지고 예쁘고... 스틸라인을 대표하기에 적합한 분이세요.

1000642434.english: Leading subordinates like these. I'm really blessed.
1000642434.korean: 이런 부하들을 이끌다니. 나는 정말 복에 겨웠군.

1000642435.english: ... I'll participate too. I just can't ignore the feelings of my subordinates.
1000642435.korean: ...저도 참가하겠습니다. 도저히 부하들의 마음을 무시할 수 없군요.

1000642437.english: We'll support you with all our might too~!

1000642440.english: I guess I should finish the training I'm doing now.

1000642441.english: Let's get moving, we'll finish before dinner!

1000642444.english: We're almost there... Did something urgent come up?
1000642444.korean: 거의 다 도착했는데... 급한 볼일이라도 생겼나요?

1000642445.english: I'm saying this because I feel like I'll turn into a fool too if I keep hanging out with you guys, you idiots!
1000642445.korean: 너희랑 계속 같이 다니다간 나까지 바보가 될 것 같아서 그런다, 이 바보들아!

1000642447.english: I'm sorry, but could you please say that one more time?

1000642448.english: It feels unique since it's a word I've never heard before. I feel like it might spark some inspiration.
1000642448.korean: 처음들어보는 단어라 느낌이 색다르네요. 영감이 떠오를 것 같아요.

1000642450.english: Haa... And do something about that creepy guy. Why has he been spacing out by himself for a while now?
1000642450.korean: 하아... 그리고 음침이 쟤 좀 어떻게 해봐. 왜 아까부터 혼자 멍 때리고 있는 거야.

1000642453.english: Doesn't she look cute like a girl in love?
1000642453.korean: 사랑에 빠진 소녀 같아서 귀엽지 않나요?

1000642454.english: Ah, I built a derivative model of the Line Ritter a while ago, and it feels exactly like that.
1000642454.korean: 아, 얼마전에 라인리터의 파생형 모형을 만들었는데, 바로 그 느낌이에요.

1000642457.english: That gloomy guy walks into a place swarming with Iron Bugs all by himself, and you take apart a scrapped car while looking for new parts.
1000642457.korean: 음침이 쟤는 혼자 철충이 득실대는 곳에 걸어들어가질 않나, 너는 새 부품을 찾는다면서 폐차를 분해하지 않나.

1000642458.english: Back when I was at the height of my popularity, the castle was practically filled with servants attending to me, do you know?
1000642458.korean: 내가 한창 인기였을 땐 내 수발을 드는 하인들로 성이 가득 찰 정도였어, 알아?

1000642459.english: Is the great Draculina really just cleaning up after you guys right now...
1000642459.korean: 그만큼 위대한 드라큐리나 님이 지금 너희들 옆에서 뒤치닥꺼리나 할...

1000642465.english: There are fragments of Goltarion's exoskeleton made by Densetsu Science lying on the floor, so I can't just walk past them.
1000642465.korean: 덴세츠 사이언스에서 만든 골타리온의 외골격 부스러기가 바닥에 떨어져 있는데, 그냥 지나칠 수는 없죠.

1000642466.english: It's okay. In a life where everyone dies, that's perfectly understandable.
1000642466.korean: 괜찮아요. 모두가 죽는 인생, 충분히 그럴 수 있죠.

1000642467.english: Why are you acting like you did me a favor? I'm the one who caught all of you, you know?
1000642467.korean: 왜 네가 생색을 내는 거야? 너희 다 내가 잡아왔거든?

1000642468.english: And Gloomy. Where have you been carrying your mind since earlier?
1000642468.korean: 그리고 음침이. 너 아까부터 정신을 어디다 두고 다니는 거야.

1000642469.english: You've already walked into strange places absentmindedly more than 10 times. Do you know?
1000642469.korean: 네가 넋놓고 이상한 곳에 걸어들어간 것만 벌써 10번이 넘어. 알아?

1000642470.english: It is number 8. Please do not inflate the number.

1000642471.english: The kid who knows that... Ah, my blood pressure...
1000642471.korean: 그걸 아는 애가... 아, 내 혈압...

1000642472.english: Thinking is my hobby, so I get absorbed even while walking. I need to fix this.
1000642472.korean: 생각하는 게 취미라 걸으면서도 몰두하게 되네요. 고쳐야겠어요.

1000642475.english: The thought of being buried forever in a coffin with my master.
1000642475.korean: 주인님과 함께 영원히 관짝 속에 묻히는 생각이요.

1000642476.english: It’s so romantic just imagining it...

1000642480.english: You've been trying to humor him since earlier, haven't you?
1000642480.korean: 너 아까부터 쟤 비위 맞춰주려고 그러는 거지, 그렇지?

1000642481.english: Isn't it a happy thing to be able to do what you love forever?
1000642481.korean: 좋아하는 걸 영원히 할 수 있다는 건 행복한 일 아닐까요?

1000642482.english: Azaz, is there something you want to do forever, too?
1000642482.korean: 아자즈 님도 영원히 하고 싶은 일이 있나요?

1000642484.english: After all, it is best to enjoy the things you love to the fullest while you are alive.
1000642484.korean: 역시 좋아하는 건 살아있는 동안 최선을 다해 즐기는 게 좋죠.

1000642487.english: Why are you two laughing so happily when we can't even have a conversation...! Am I the weird one? Huh?
1000642487.korean: 둘이 대화가 안 되고 있는데 왜 즐겁게 웃고 있는 건데...! 내가 이상한거야? 응?

1000642488.english: Ah, never mind. Let's hurry up and finish what we need to do and part ways.
1000642488.korean: 아, 됐어. 빨리 할 거 하고 헤어지자.

1000642489.english: You. You have to keep your promise to put on a stage performance for me. It's hot in the summer, so maybe later.
1000642489.korean: 너. 나한테 무대공연 만들어준다는 약속, 꼭 지켜야 돼. 여름엔 더우니까 좀 나중에.

1000642490.english: I'm already annoyed because of that black cat, and now this is just another hassle.
1000642490.korean: 안그래도 그 까만 고양이 때문에 열 받는데 이게 왠 고생이람.

1000642491.english: Let's do it properly starting now.

1000642495.english: You arrived sooner than I expected.

1000642497.english: We would have arrived much sooner if you guys hadn't acted so erratically.
1000642497.korean: 너희들이 돌발행동만 안 했으면 훨씬 빨리 도착했을 텐데?

1000642498.english: You have an impatient personality. It is better to live a little more leisurely.
1000642498.korean: 성격이 급하시네요. 좀 더 여유있게 사는게 좋답니다.

1000642499.english: Calm down. A sudden rise in blood pressure only hastens death.
1000642499.korean: 진정하세요. 급격한 혈압 상승은 죽음을 재촉할 뿐이에요.

1000642500.english: It's because of you guys, you guys...!

1000642501.english: Haa... Never mind. What am I supposed to do now?
1000642501.korean: 하아........ 됐어. 이제 뭘 하면 되는데?

1000642504.english: Wait a minute, we haven't even secured the territory here yet?
1000642504.korean: 잠깐만, 여기 지역 확보도 덜 됐는데?

1000642505.english: You must not engage in dangerous behavior without your master's permission.
1000642505.korean: 주인님의 허락 없이 위험행동은 안 돼요.

1000642506.english: For once, you're saying something sensible.

1000642507.english: What if I happen to breathe my last here... and Master never finds my body?
1000642507.korean: 혹시라도 여기서 숨을 거뒀다가... 주인님이 제 주검을 영영 발견하지 못하면 어떡해요.

1000642508.english: There is a security device here. To disable it...

1000642510.english: Where did you get that driver?
1000642510.korean: 너 그 드라이버 어디서 난 거야?

1000642512.english: You made it? Now? With what?

1000642514.english: Ah, right... never mind if you don't want to talk about it.

1000642515.english: ......! It's an Iron Bug reaction. And quite a lot of them...

1000642516.english: Ah, so I end up meeting a lonely death here after all...
1000642516.korean: 아아, 저는 결국 이곳에서 쓸쓸한 죽음을 맞이하게 되는 거군요...

1000642517.english: Stop talking nonsense and get ready to fight! You're tough!
1000642517.korean: 재수없는 소리하지 말고 싸울 준비나 해! 너 세잖아!

1000642518.english: What is that tower... It definitely wasn't anything special...
1000642518.korean: 뭐야, 저 탑은... 분명히 별거 없었는데...

1000642519.english: On top of that, why aren't the security devices attacking the Iron Bug and only shooting at us?
1000642519.korean: 거기다 경비장치들은 왜 철충은 공격 안하고 우리만 쏘는 거야?

1000642520.english: Hey, didn't you touch something wrong?
1000642520.korean: 야, 네가 뭐 잘못 만진 거 아냐?

1000642522.english: Alright, now that we're done, let's go find the parts.
1000642522.korean: 자, 끝났으니까 어서 부품을 찾으러 가죠.

1000642523.english: I ended up surviving... As expected, I am destined to spend eternity with my Master...
1000642523.korean: 살아남아버리고 말았네요... 역시, 저는 주인님과 영원을 함께할 운명...

1000642524.english: Don't you guys care about that tower and village that suddenly appeared?!
1000642524.korean: 너네는 갑자기 나타난 저 탑이랑 마을이 신경쓰이지도 않아?!

1000642525.english: Hmm, come to think of it...

1000642526.english: It looks very interesting. I think I could find some cool parts there, too.
1000642526.korean: 굉장히 흥미롭게 생겼네요. 저기서도 멋진 부품을 구할 수 있을 것 같아요.

1000642527.english: Please wait. The contract clearly stated that it was for the Kohei Cult's AGS parts.
1000642527.korean: 기다려주세요. 분명 계약 내용은 코헤이 교단의 AGS 부품이었어요.

1000642529.english: But I've become more interested in that tower, so let's look into it separately.
1000642529.korean: 그런데 저는 저 탑에 더 흥미가 생겨버려서요. 따로 떨어져서 찾아보죠.

1000642530.english: Ah-ah. I'm so sick and tired of this!

1000642531.english: I'm going back. Well then, goodbye— *cough*.

1000642534.english: What is this... a wall of light?
1000642534.korean: 뭐야, 이건 또... 빛으로 된 벽?

1000642535.english: It's a kind of... energy field. We're trapped inside.
1000642535.korean: 일종의... 에너지 장이군요. 저희는 이 안에 갇혔어요.

1000642538.english: Then smash it quickly! So I can go back.

1000642539.english: You can't just break it. You need to find a device that emits energy.
1000642539.korean: 그냥은 못 부숴요. 에너지를 방출하는 장치를 찾아야죠.

1000642543.english: The moment of death is approaching us.

1000642545.english: Is this still the time to be spouting such nonsense? What are you going to do now?!
1000642545.korean: 아직도 그렇게 헛소리나 할 때야? 이제 어쩔거냐고!

1000642546.english: We have to destroy the energy release device.

1000642547.english: You said you didn't know where it was?

1000642548.english: Now I know. These lights were repeaters.

1000642549.english: It’s a bit of a drastic method, but I tried forcibly accessing it to track the energy flow...
1000642549.korean: 조금 과격한 방법이지만, 강제로 엑세스해서 에너지 흐름을 추적해봤는데...

1000642550.english: ...No, tell me it's not true. Say it's a lie, quickly!

1000642551.english: Hehe, it looks like both you and I will be able to achieve our goals.
1000642551.korean: 후후, 저도 당신도 목적을 이룰 수 있겠네요.

1000642553.english: The release device is at the very top of that tower.
1000642553.korean: 방출 장치는 저 탑 꼭대기에 있어요.

1000642556.english: It's just uncomfortable because it's not the equipment I usually use.
1000642556.korean: 아무래도 원래 쓰던 장비가 아니다보니 불편하거든요.

1000642558.english: I... I was wrong... I don't want it anymore...

1000642561.english: I was surprised. How long has it been there?

1000642562.english: Oh, no, wait. I've never done that.

1000642565.english: Just make sure the betting limit is as you said...
1000642565.korean: 말한 대로 판돈 제한만 확실히 해...

1000642566.english: But what about the other one?

1000642568.english: Losing isn't something to be ashamed of. Accept it.
1000642568.korean: 진다는 건 부끄러운 일이 아냐. 받아들이렴.

1000642571.english: Even tho they didn't do anything themselves...

1000642575.english: Come to think of it, didn't you say there was a branch of the denomination nearby?
1000642575.korean: 그러고보니 근처에 교단의 지부가 있다고도 했지?

1000642576.english: Still, if I go there in person, something will be left, right?

1000642579.english: That's right. It was a sortie, right?

1000642580.english: ... They're really enjoying the summer over there.

1000642581.english: We haven't even gone halfway yet.

1000642582.english: I should have done it this way sooner.

1000642583.english: ... Still, making the schedule in 36-hour units was a bit much, wasn't it?

1000642586.english: What else is going on...? Azazel, I'm coming in.

1000642588.english: I don't think I need to do it...

1000642591.english: Oh, this is delicious. Did you make it yourself?

1000642593.english: Well, that won't work on Saraqael.

1000642600.english: I forgot to say something. Is there anything I can help you with?
1000642600.korean: 말하는 걸 잊었네. 혹시 도와줄 거 있어?

1000642602.english: It's not much of a burden, but...

1000642607.english: Are there any remaining androids from the denomination?

1000642612.english: It's okay. It's a really important matter for Azazel.

1000642613.english: Um, no. Veronica, come with us too.
1000642613.korean: 음, 아냐. 베로니카도 둘이랑 같이 가줘.

1000642614.english: Wouldn't it be significant if the Savior himself prepared the 'bestowal of light'?
1000642614.korean: 구원자가 직접 '빛내림'을 준비하는 것도 큰 의미가 되지 않을까?

1000642616.english: Um, yeah. I'll be looking forward to it...

1000642620.english: Oh, how long has it been there?

1000642621.english: That's right. Didn't you say it was nocturnal?

1000642625.english: The situation is different, isn't it?

1000642627.english: It's pretty. Are you here just to show me that?

1000642628.english: ... You're not doing that on purpose, are you?

1000642631.english: There's a Kohei sect branch nearby. There-
1000642631.korean: 근처에 코헤이 교단 지부가 있거든. 거기에-

1000642633.english: Let me guess. So, you're interested in something like the Kohei Sect's security AGS, right?
1000642633.korean: 내가 맞춰볼게. 코헤이 교단의 경비AGS 같은 거에 관심이 생긴거지?

1000642635.english: No... Come back... Don't keep it to yourself...

1000642642.english: All of it... It's a Steel Bug.

1000642643.english: Hirume, Constantia has taken care of all the education.

1000642648.english: That's a relief. I was able to keep everything this time too.
1000642648.korean: 다행이야. 이번에도 전부 지킬 수 있었어.

1000642651.english: I guess I'll just wander around.

1000642652.english: What's this now... That's an unusual combination.

1000642657.english: We just greeted each other a moment ago...

1000642659.english: Hirume, let's go somewhere cool and rest for a bit.
1000642659.korean: 히루메, 일단 시원한 곳으로 가서 쉬자.

1000642662.english: That's right. Poi, you're getting your swimsuit soon, right?

1000642663.english: I'm really looking forward to it!

1000642665.english: It's true. If Poi shows up in a swimsuit... I might not be able to hold it in.
1000642665.korean: 진짜야. 만약 포이가 수영복을 입고 나타나면... 못 참을지도 모르겠어.

1000642668.english: Well, since I've been caught, I might as well watch a bit more.

1000642679.english: I... I have borne many sins. So much so that they must atone, not only in life but even in death.&nSo, my sins... are you saying the Savior will forgive them all...? Really, really... is it all over now...?&nSob... Haaaaaaang...! ... Savior. Tho it's insignificant, I will now offer everything I have left to the Savior.&nThis body, these abilities... and even my heart and future... they all belong to the Savior who gave me a new life. "
1000642679.korean: 저는... 많은 죄를 짊어졌습니다. 살아서는 물론, 죽어서까지 속죄해야할 만큼요.&n그런 제 죄를… 구원자님께선 전부 사해주시는 건가요…? 정말, 정말로… 이제 다 끝난 건가요…?&n흑… 흐아아아아앙…! ...구원자님. 보잘것 없지만, 이제 제게 남은 것을 모두 구원자님에게 바칠게요.&n이 몸과 능력… 그리고 제 마음과 미래까지 전부… 저를 다시 태어나게 해주신 구원자님의 것이에요.

1000642680.english: - At least 4 people have joined the Kohei sect branch.
1000642680.korean: - 코헤이 교단 지부로 들어간 인물은 최소 4명.

1000642682.english: I tried contacting four people, but there was no response. It’s not like their phones were turned off, but after a long wait, all I got was a cold missed call notification.
1000642682.korean: - 4명에게 연락해봐도 응답이 없다. 전원이 꺼져있는 것도 아닌데, 오랜 기다림 끝에 돌아온 건 싸늘한 부재중 알림뿐이다.

1000642683.english: My dear, it is dangerous outside. Go inside immediately.
1000642683.korean: 그대여, 바깥은 위험하다. 어서 안으로 들어가거라.

1000642684.english: To think they couldn't come back...?

1000642685.english: - Pointed to the branch office to the flustered Hirume.

1000642686.english: A pillar of bright red light was soaring into the sky. Those who saw the ominous red light stopped in their tracks and looked up at it.
1000642686.korean: - 새빨간 빛기둥이 하늘로 솟구치고 있었다. 흉흉한 붉은빛을 본 이들은 제자리에 멈춰서서 그것을 올려다봤다.

1000642687.english: - You instinctively realize that the reason you can't contact the four of them, and the reason the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) attacked the Orca, is all because of that.
1000642687.korean: - 4명과 연락이 안 되는 것도, 오르카 호에 철충이 공습해 온 것도, 모두 저게 원인이라는 걸 본능적으로 깨닫게 된다.

1000642688.english: I looked at the troop deployment map again. Just as I was about to distribute personnel to rescue the soldier who had gone to the branch, a shell landed nearby.
1000642688.korean: - 부대 배치도를 다시 봤다. 지부에 간 대원을 구출하기 위해 인원을 배분하려는 순간, 가까운 곳에 포탄이 떨어졌다.

1000642689.english: It's not safe here anymore, either. We have to evacuate, hurry!
1000642689.korean: 여기도 더 이상 안전하지 않다. 피신해야한다, 어서!

1000642690.english: Even I know what you are worried about.
1000642690.korean: 그대가 무얼 걱정하는지는 첩도 알고 있다.

1000642691.english: However, as the leader of the Orca, shouldn't you look after yourself first, especially in a crisis like this?
1000642691.korean: 하지만 오르카 호의 수장이라면 지금 같은 위기 상황일수록 본인부터 돌봐야 하지 않겠느냐.

1000642692.english: If anything were to happen to you, uncontrollable chaos would ensue.
1000642692.korean: 행여 그대에게 무슨 일이라도 생긴다면 그땐 걷잡을 수 없는 혼란이 찾아올터.

1000642694.english: Are we not the ones who have been through countless battlefields with you? I do not think we would crumble at a crisis of merely this magnitude.
1000642694.korean: 그대와 숱한 전장을 겪어온 이들 아니더냐? 고작 이 정도 위기에 스러지리라 생각되지 않는구나.

1000642695.english: Or do you... think they can't even take care of themselves?
1000642695.korean: 아니면 그대는... 그들이 제 앞가림도 못할 거라 여기느냐?

1000642696.english: That is naturally what a concubine should do.

1000642697.english: - Hirume is right. There are priorities in work.
1000642697.korean: - 히루메의 말이 맞다. 일에는 우선순위가 있다.

1000642698.english: - The priority right now is to protect the crew here and the Orca.
1000642698.korean: - 지금 우선해야 할 일은 이곳의 대원들과 오르카 호를 지키는 것.

1000642699.english: "Let's hurry and resolve this situation and rescue those who have been left behind." Having made up my mind, I boarded the Orca.
1000642699.korean: - 서둘러 이 사태를 해결하고 낙오된 이들을 구출하자. 결심을 굳힌 나는 오르카 호에 올라섰다.

1000642701.english: I see you are safe, Master!

1000642702.english: Ever since a tower and a pillar of light appeared in a place where there was nothing, Iron Bugs have been attacking from all directions.
1000642702.korean: 아무것도 없던 장소에 탑과 빛기둥이 출현한 후로 전방위에서 철충이 공격해 오고 있어요.

1000642703.english: That is definitely the cause, though...

1000642704.english: Alpha trailed off. If she, who handled the practical work alongside the seven chairmen of Pex, doesn't know, then no one on the Orca knows about that.
1000642704.korean: - 알파가 말끝을 흐렸다. 펙스의 일곱 회장 곁에서 실무를 담당했던 그녀가 모른다면 저것에 대해 알고 있는 사람은 오르카 호에 없다.

1000642705.english: Some of the generals who went to inspect the infrastructure have not yet returned.
1000642705.korean: 인프라를 점검하러 간 장성급 대원 일부가 아직 복귀하지 못 했어요.

1000642706.english: The combat power is comparable to when the commanders of each unit are present...
1000642706.korean: 각 부대의 지휘관분들이 있을 때 만큼의 전투력은...

1000642707.english: - After listening to Constancia, I checked the panel.

1000642708.english: Information is pouring in in real time. What is appearing here, what is showing up—everything is related to the Iron Bug (Iron Bug).
1000642708.korean: - 실시간으로 정보가 쏟아지고 있다. 어디서 뭐가 나타나고, 저게 등장하고, 모조리 철충과 관련됐다.

1000642709.english: I received far more reports in 10 minutes than in a month, so I could tell how urgent the situation was.
1000642709.korean: - 한 달 동안 받은 보고보다 10분 동안 받은 보고가 훨씬 더 많았으니, 상황이 얼마나 긴박하게 돌아가는지 알 수 있었다.

1000642710.english: The situation will improve once the naval forces arrive, Master.
1000642710.korean: 해상병력이 도착하면 지금보다 상황이 호전될 거예요, 주인님.

1000642711.english: But until then, we must focus on maintaining the front line.
1000642711.korean: 하지만 그 전까지는 전선 유지에 집중해야 해요.

1000642712.english: All troops except the seriously wounded have been deployed to the front lines, and the AGS members are also helping with base construction, but...
1000642712.korean: 중상자를 제외한 모든 병력이 전선에 투입됐고, AGS분들도 기지 구축에 도움을 주고 계시지만...

1000642713.english: The reason Constancia was vague is probably because she is desperate to maintain the status quo.
1000642713.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 말을 흐린 이유는 현상유지에 급급해서겠지.

1000642714.english: My dear, I have compiled the data.

1000642715.english: Hirume appeared holding a large bundle of papers and transmitted information to the panel.
1000642715.korean: - 커다란 종이뭉치를 들고 나타난 히루메가 패널로 정보를 전송했다.

1000642716.english: It was data that digitized the current locations and battle situations of personnel associated with the Orca.
1000642716.korean: - 오르카 호와 관련된 인원들의 현 위치, 전황을 데이터화한 자료였다.

1000642717.english: Upon checking the battle records from various regions, it was extremely precarious, just as Alpha and Constancia had said.
1000642717.korean: - 각지의 전투기록을 확인해 보니 알파와 콘스탄챠가 말했던 것처럼 굉장히 위태로웠다.

1000642718.english: - A situation where even the slightest change in strategy could cause the entire defensive line to collapse.
1000642718.korean: - 조금이라도 전략에 변화를 줬다간 방어선 자체가 무너질 수 있는 상황.

1000642719.english: There was absolutely no room to send reinforcements.
1000642719.korean: - 지원군을 보낼 여유 같은 건 조금도 없었다.

1000642720.english: Are you saying that you cannot contact the people who are currently joining?
1000642720.korean: 합류 중인 분들과 연락이 안 된다는 말씀이신가요?

1000642721.english: What? Master, what on earth is going on...

1000642723.english: Of all times, while the others were at the branch...
1000642723.korean: 하필 다른 분들이 지부에 간 사이에...

1000642724.english: But it might be another opportunity.
1000642724.korean: 하지만 또 다른 기회일 지도 몰라요.

1000642725.english: If the people who went to the branch can just stop that tower, this situation will be resolved, right?
1000642725.korean: 지부에 간 분들이 저 탑만 멈출 수 있다면 이 상황도 해결되겠죠.

1000642727.english: It’s not even a county-level unit, so there are limits to what can be done with just six people.
1000642727.korean: 군 단위도 아니고 고작 여섯으로 할 수 있는 일은 한계가 있지.

1000642728.english: I am not sure if that light is really the problem, or if stopping it will end everything.
1000642728.korean: - 정말로 저 빛이 문제인지, 그리고 저걸 멈추면 다 끝나는건지 아무것도 확실하지 않다.

1000642729.english: ...I see. There is no guarantee that stopping that will solve everything.
1000642729.korean: ...그렇군요. 저걸 멈춘다고 모든 게 해결된다는 보장은 없어요.

1000642730.english: So this isn't the end. The Iron Bugs swarming here are just a byproduct of that light, and if there is another purpose...
1000642730.korean: 이게 끝이 아니라는 거죠. 철충이 몰려든 건 저 빛의 부산물이고, 다른 목적이 있다면...

1000642731.english: I don't even want to imagine it.

1000642732.english: Even so, what we can do is limited.
1000642732.korean: 그렇다 해도 우리가 할 수 있는 건 정해져 있다.

1000642733.english: All we can do right now is to use all our might to stop the Iron Bug.
1000642733.korean: - 지금 할 수 있는 건 전력을 다해 철충을 막아내는 것뿐이다.

1000642734.english: Then, Master, please forgive my rudeness in not being able to stay by your side. I think I must go out to the battlefield with the others.
1000642734.korean: 그럼 주인님, 곁을 지키지 못하는 무례를 용서해주시길. 저도 다른 분들과 함께 전장에 나가봐야 할 것 같아요.

1000642735.english: I feel the same way as Alpha. The Battle Maid sisters are out on the battlefield, so we need every single person's help. As for Hirume...
1000642735.korean: 저도 알파님이랑 마찬가지예요. 배틀 메이드 자매도 전장에 나가 있어서 한 사람의 도움이라도 더 필요해요. 히루메 양은...

1000642737.english: My dear, I entrust you with the conducting.

1000642738.english: After Hirume nodded, the three of them rushed out of the captain's cabin and joined the battlefield.
1000642738.korean: - 히루메가 고개를 끄덕인 뒤 세 사람은 함장실에서 뛰쳐 나가 전장으로 합류했다.

1000642739.english: I connected the panel to the huge monitor installed in the captain's quarters. Soon after, the location where the battle was taking place was displayed on the screen. At least over 100 live battle scenes were displayed.
1000642739.korean: - 나는 패널을 함장실에 설치된 거대한 모니터에 연동시켰다. 곧 이어 전투가 일어나는 장소를 화면에 띄웠다. 못해도 100은 넘는 전투 실황이 출력됐다.

1000642740.english: Even after ordering autonomous command to the unit's superiors and focusing solely on the battlefield, there were more than a few things to worry about.
1000642740.korean: - 부대 상급자에게 자율 지휘를 명령하고, 격전지에만 집중해도 신경 쓸 게 한두 가지가 아니었다.

1000642741.english: - Additional troops were deployed to unfavorable battlefields, and gaps were filled with other forces.
1000642741.korean: - 불리한 전장에 대원들을 추가 배치하고, 공백이 생겨난 곳은 또 다른 병력으로 보충했다.

1000642742.english: My head was about to explode trying to grasp the situation and issue commands amidst the battlefield changing by the second, but I cannot stop. If I stop thinking for even a moment, the front line will collapse.
1000642742.korean: - 초 단위로 변해가는 전황 속에서 상황을 파악하고 지휘를 내리느라 머리가 터질 지경이었지만 멈출 수 없다. 내가 조금이라도 생각을 멈췄다간 전선이 무너진다.

1000642743.english: Suddenly, a peculiarity of the troop deployment map flashed through my mind.
1000642743.korean: - 문득 머릿속에서 부대 배치도의 특이점이 스쳐지나갔다.

1000642744.english: The unit that planned the hell training was near the branch.
1000642744.korean: - 지옥훈련을 계획했던 부대가, 지부 근처에 있었다.

1000642745.english: There is no end to it.

1000642748.english: It's so big here that we'll be surrounded in no time.

1000642751.english: Are you really doing this even in a situation like this...!

1000642752.english: That is why I am doing this.

1000642753.english: Oh my? Weren't you walking on purpose?
1000642753.korean: 어머? 일부러 걸어가고 계셨던 거 아니었나요?

1000642754.english: No. There is a rule that we angels cannot fly in designated holy sites—
1000642754.korean: 아니에요. 저희 천사들은 지정된 성지에서는 비행할 수 없다는 규칙이-

1000642757.english: If it had flown away, it would have turned into a beehive by now.
1000642757.korean: 만약 날아갔으면, 지금쯤 벌집이 되어 있었을테니까요.

1000642758.english: Ha, enough to darken the sky... Iron Bugs...

1000642759.english: O Light, thank you for your blessings today as well.

1000642760.english: ...Follow me. If you are so unhappy about walking, I will open the way for you at flying speed.
1000642760.korean: ...따라와라. 걸어가는게 그렇게 불만이면, 날아가는 속도로 길을 열어주지.

1000642764.english: The Iron Bugs are attacking the believers indiscriminately. And...
1000642764.korean: 철충들이 신도들을 무차별적으로 공격하고 있습니다. 그리고...

1000642765.english: You aren't putting up any resistance.

1000642766.english: We must protect the believers! Sarah Kael!

1000642767.english: You don't have to call out so anxiously.

1000642768.english: It is my role, Judge Sarakael, to punish the apostate.
1000642768.korean: 배교자를 징벌하는 것은 나, 심판관 사라카엘의 역할.

1000642769.english: I will not stand by and watch mere iron bugs harm the creatures of light.
1000642769.korean: 한낱 철충들이 빛의 피조물에 해를 끼치는 것을 두고보지는 않겠다.

1000642773.english: You have completely lost your reason. Do you not even intend to block the attack?
1000642773.korean: 완전히 이성을 잃었군. 공격을 막아낼 생각도 없는가.

1000642774.english: Step back. I will wipe out everything blocking the way.

1000642775.english: Hey, what are you doing! I told you we have to hurry and follow the angels!
1000642775.korean: 야, 뭐해! 빨리 천사들 따라가야 된다고!

1000642777.english: Are you out of your mind?! Even at this point—

1000642778.english: I think we can upgrade the communication equipment. We will be able to contact the commander soon.
1000642778.korean: 통신기를 좀 개량할 수 있을 것 같거든요. 곧 사령관에게 연락할 수 있을 거예요.

1000642780.english: I guess I have no choice for the sake of my master.

1000642784.korean: 언니, 그만해! 더 이상은 안 돼...!

1000642785.english: Are you listening? This fog is all your eyes and ears...!
1000642785.korean: 듣고 있지? 이 안개는 전부 언니의 눈이랑 귀니까...!

1000642789.english: Ah, O "Prophet of the Dawn." The frail little lambs, following the Shepherd's guidance, did not doubt the salvation of light for a moment, and finally welcomed salvation like spring rain announcing the beginning of life.
1000642789.korean: 아아, "새벽의 예언자"시여. 가냘픈 어린 양들은 목자의 인도를 따라 빛의 구원을 한줌 의심하지 않았으니, 드디어 생명의 시작을 알리는 봄비 같은 구원을 맞이하였습니다.

1000642790.english: I shall welcome salvation with open arms. At this very moment, I welcome the true salvation proclaimed by the "Prophet of the Dawn"...!
1000642790.korean: 나, 두 팔 벌려 구원을 맞이하리라. "새벽의 예언자"께서 전하신 진정한 구원을 지금 이 순간 맞이하노라...!

1000642792.english: Salvation has come! Kya ha ha ha, Apostle of Light! Come quickly to the embrace of the light...!
1000642792.korean: 구원이 도래했다! 꺄하하하핫, 빛의 사도시여! 어서 나를 빛의 품으로...!

1000642797.english: To think you interfered with the moment of salvation...! Die...!

1000642801.english: I knocked him unconscious. I'll hide him in a nearby, intact house.

1000642803.english: These Iron Bugs are running wild right now, just like wild animals.
1000642803.korean: 지금 이 철충들은 마치 야생동물처럼 날뛰고 있습니다.

1000642804.english: The Order's AGS units are a variable, but... at least the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) don't seem likely to search civilian homes and kill everyone like they did during the War of Annihilation.
1000642804.korean: 교단의 AGS들이 변수지만... 적어도 철충들은 멸망 전쟁 때처럼 민가를 수색해서 모조리 죽일 것 같지는 않습니다.

1000642808.english: Together with us... let's save the believers and Angel's older sister.
1000642808.korean: 저희와 함께... 신도분들과, 엔젤의 언니를 구하죠.

1000642812.english: On the day of the descent of light, the light sends down an apostle,

1000642813.english: The many little lambs praise the grace of the light with overflowing blessing.
1000642813.korean: 뭇 어린 양들은 축복에 겨워 빛의 은혜를 찬양하도다.

1000642814.english: The apostle put the sheep to the test.

1000642815.english: O sinful one, you shall face the shadow of light.
1000642815.korean: 죄 많은 자여, 빛의 그림자를 마주하리라.

1000642816.english: There's no end to this at this rate.

1000642817.english: Sarah Kael! It's at the back!

1000642819.english: We have secured this place as well.

1000642821.english: There are no believers around here anymore!
1000642821.korean: 이제 이 근처에는 신도 분들이 없어요!

1000642823.english: Yes. Because all the believers who have come to their senses are filled with a joy akin to madness.
1000642823.korean: 네. 정신을 차리고 있는 신도분들은 모두, 광기와 비슷한 기쁨에 차있으니까요.

1000642824.english: Then let's get moving. Even at this very moment, surely...
1000642824.korean: 그럼 어서 움직이죠. 지금 이 순간에도 분명...

1000642826.english: I know you can't save everyone.
1000642826.korean: 모두를 구할 수 없다는 건, 알고 있어요.

1000642828.english: Still, cough, I'll do my best.

1000642829.english: Come this way. I'll guide you thru the secret passage!

1000642830.english: While saving the devotees thru there, Babelo- Kyaak?!
1000642830.korean: 거기를 통해 신도분들을 구하면서 바벨로- 꺅?!

1000642833.english: Oh, I'm sorry. I meant to tell you in advance.

1000642834.english: While I was upgrading the communicator, I also made a disposable remote hacking device. Since it's a component, I couldn't make it not light up.
1000642834.korean: 통신기를 개량하는 김에 1회용 원격 해킹 장치를 만들었거든요. 부품이 부품이라서, 빛이 안나게 할 수는 없었네요.

1000642836.english: It won't last very long. It's a bit suspicious that the channel suddenly opened after not working at all...
1000642836.korean: 그리 오래는 못 갈거예요. 안 먹히다가 갑자기 채널이 열린 게 조금 수상하기는 하지만...

1000642837.english: Hurry up and go. Angel, where's the secret passage?
1000642837.korean: 어서 가요. 엔젤, 비밀 통로는 어디죠?

1000642840.english: It feels like I’ve entered a coffin.

1000642842.english: If you're not careful, you might hit a wall.
1000642842.korean: 조심하지 않으면 벽에 부딪칠 수도 있겠습니다.

1000642844.english: ...What is this passageway? It leads in all directions, and there are even hidden spots.
1000642844.korean: ...뭐야, 이 통로. 사방으로 이어진 데다가 숨겨진 곳도 있어.

1000642846.english: The sound of clicking one's tongue is coming back.

1000642847.english: It's an abnormally large place. I wonder what kind of place it is.
1000642847.korean: 비정상적으로 넓은 장소야. 어떻게 된 곳이래.

1000642848.english: So it's echo location. It involves sensing the space using returning sound waves, and to think that it's possible with just your bare hands. Bismarck's technology is truly amazing.
1000642848.korean: 에코 로케이션이군요. 돌아오는 음파로 공간을 파악하는 건데, 맨몸으로 가능하다니. 비스마르크의 기술력은 정말 놀랍네요.

1000642849.english: Hehe. Let's stay close in the future.

1000642850.english: Enough. Once I leave, I'm never going to get involved with you guys again.
1000642850.korean: 됐거든? 나가면 너네랑 다시는 안 엮일 거야.

1000642851.english: There must be a door somewhere around here-

1000642854.english: There are traps set up to prevent intruders from entering.
1000642854.korean: 침입자들이 들어오는 걸 대비해서 함정이 설치돼있어요.

1000642855.english: Please do not touch anything other than what I have told you.
1000642855.korean: 제가 말씀드린 것 이외엔 건드리지 말아주세요.

1000642856.english: I thought there would at least be a secret passage in the final sanctuary, but...
1000642856.korean: 최후의 성역에 비밀통로 정도는 있을 거라고 생각했지만...

1000642857.english: This trap was set targeting humans, not Iron Bugs.
1000642857.korean: 이 함정은 철충이 아니라 인간을 노리고 설치됐군요.

1000642858.english: They must have been busy enough just building the sanctuary, but to think of such a labyrinthine secret passage.
1000642858.korean: 성역을 짓는 것만 해도 바빴을 텐데, 이런 미궁 같은 비밀통로라니.

1000642859.english: Were those apostates trying to build a thousand-year kingdom or something?
1000642859.korean: 배교자 녀석들은 천년 왕국이라도 건설하려 했던건가.

1000642862.english: I think we can establish communication with the commander now. What would you like to do?
1000642862.korean: 이제 사령관이랑 통신을 연결할 수 있을 것 같은데, 어떻게 하시겠어요?

1000642866.english: After several hours of fierce fighting, they finally caught their breath with the arrival of the troops led by Mari and Yong.
1000642866.korean: - 몇 시간째 격렬한 공방이 이어지다, 마리와 용이 이끄는 부대의 합류로 간신히 한숨을 돌렸다.

1000642867.english: Just as I checked the updated damage report with a hopeful heart and breathed a sigh of relief, a communication request came in from a channel used for private purposes rather than command.
1000642867.korean: - 기도하는 심정으로 갱신된 피해 보고를 확인하고 안도의 한숨을 내쉬었을 때, 지휘용이 아닌 사적인 용도로 쓰는 채널에서 통신 요청이 들어왔다.

1000642868.english: I snapped awake at the name that popped up on the panel.
1000642868.korean: - 패널에 떠오른 이름에 정신이 번쩍 들었다.

1000642872.english: The communication, which was spewing out nothing but noise, was cut off in vain.
1000642872.korean: - 노이즈만 잔뜩 뿜어내던 통신은 허망하게 끊겨버리고 말았다.

1000642875.english: I'm sorry. The communication interference has become 570% stronger than expected.
1000642875.korean: 면목 없어요. 통신 방해가 예상치보다 570%나 강해졌어요.

1000642876.english: My companion... I see you are safe...

1000642877.english: The situation outside might be even worse than here.
1000642877.korean: 바깥은 여기보다 더 심한 상황일지도 모릅니다.

1000642878.english: Lord Azazel, what will you do?

1000642880.english: Let's go to the top. We'll do what we can right now.
1000642880.korean: 탑으로 가요. 저희는 지금 저희가 할 수 있는 일을 하죠.

1000642881.english: I will save the believers and Angel's older sister, and stop the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) that are trying to harm my companion.
1000642881.korean: 신도분들과 엔젤의 언니를 구하고, 반려를 해하려 하는 철충들도 막겠어요.

1000642882.english: Yes. If we neutralize that tower, at least no more Iron Bugs will appear.
1000642882.korean: 네. 저 탑을 무력화하면 적어도 철충들이 더 나타나지는 않을 거예요.

1000642883.english: That is a good point, but it might also fail.

1000642886.english: My partner will also think that I will act this way.
1000642886.korean: 반려 또한 제가 이렇게 행동할거라고 생각할 거예요.

1000642887.english: Even if we are in danger... our companion will save us. Without a doubt.
1000642887.korean: 만약 위기에 처하더라도... 반려는 저희를 구해주겠죠. 틀림없이.

1000642889.english: I, I don't want to hear that from Sarakael...!
1000642889.korean: 사, 사라카엘한테 그런 소리 듣고 싶지 않아요...!

1000642890.english: Let's go quickly. Master is in danger.

1000642891.english: Now that I can finally be with my Master in this world... I can't die like this.
1000642891.korean: 이제야... 현세에서 주인님과 함께할 수 있게 되었는데... 이대로 죽을수는 없어요.

1000642892.english: Yes. We will definitely rescue our companion from danger, and we will return safely as well. Let's go.
1000642892.korean: 네. 반드시 반려를 위기에서 구해내고, 저희도 무사히 돌아갈거예요. 가죠.

1000642893.english: ...Angel, I have something to ask you. Is it okay if you tell me while moving?
1000642893.korean: ...엔젤, 물어볼 게 있는데 괜찮을까요? 움직이면서 이야기해줘도 괜찮아요.

1000642897.english: Do they swarm like bees as soon as they come out onto the surface?

1000642899.english: What, what? I knew Gloomy was tough, but was he really that tough?
1000642899.korean: 뭐, 뭐야? 음침이 쟤, 쎈 건 알고 있었는데 저 정도였어?

1000642900.english: But something has been strange since earlier.

1000642901.english: I am being led somewhere. Like when you get lost in the fog, I can sense someone's intention.
1000642901.korean: 어디론가 유도되고 있습니다. 안개에 길을 잃었을 때처럼, 누군가의 의도가 느껴집니다.

1000642902.english: We aren't being driven into a dead end. If we head this way, there is a wide area...
1000642902.korean: 막다른 곳으로 몰리고 있진 않아요. 이쪽으로 향하면 넓은 곳이...

1000642905.english: This way ahead... surely not on purpose...?

1000642907.english: In that case, we have to break through somewhere else, even if we have to force it!

1000642908.english: It's not that a trap was set...

1000642909.english: And in other places, the guardians...

1000642910.english: ...Azazel, how is what I told you earlier? Can you feel the energy of the photons?
1000642910.korean: ...아자젤님, 아까 알려드렸던 건 어떤가요? 광자의 기운이 느껴지세요?

1000642914.english: You don't have to worry. Because... I can do it.
1000642914.korean: 신경쓰지 않으셔도 괜찮아요. 제가... 할 수 있으니까요.

1000642916.english: And, because it is something I have to do.

1000642917.english: You can see a square ahead.

1000642919.english: Traces of blood splattered everywhere, and believers who have returned to the embrace of the light...
1000642919.korean: 곳곳에 피가 튄 흔적과 빛의 품으로 돌아간 신도들이라니...

1000642921.english: It is a trace of a civil war that occurred in the past.

1000642923.english: What, what is this? You could have at least made a grave for it. Why did you just leave it neglected?
1000642923.korean: 뭐, 뭐야 이거? 무덤이라도 만들어주지, 왜 방치해 둔 거야.

1000642926.english: It's the work of the Iron Bug, isn't it? Even after suffering this terrible ordeal, why are the branch kids—
1000642926.korean: 철충 짓이지? 이 끔찍한 일을 당하고도 지부 애들은 왜 철충을-

1000642931.english: So, humans... were fighting amongst themselves.

1000642932.english: The smell of preservatives is stinging my nose.

1000642933.english: It seems like they mobilized every means possible to maintain this form.
1000642933.korean: 이 형태를 유지하기 위해 모든 수단을 동원한 것 같아요.

1000642935.english: How could this happen to the bodies of believers who should be returning to the embrace of the light...
1000642935.korean: 빛의 품으로 돌아가야 할 신도들의 몸에 어찌...

1000642936.english: I understand why a human statue was erected at the secret altar.
1000642936.korean: 비밀제단에 인간의 동상을 세워둔 이유를 알겠어요.

1000642937.english: It expressed the horrors that occurred at that time, the cruelty of humanity, through the altar.
1000642937.korean: 그 때 일어난 참혹함을, 인간의 잔혹함을 제단으로 표현한 거죠.

1000642938.english: And the reason we were sent here is because we believe in a human savior.
1000642938.korean: 그리고 저흴 이곳에 보낸 건 우리들이 인간인 구원자를 믿기 때문에.

1000642939.english: They deliberately lured you here to mock that belief.
1000642939.korean: 그 믿음을 조롱하기 위해 일부러 이곳으로 유도한 거예요.

1000642940.english: You said that everything started, Angel. What did you mean by that?
1000642940.korean: 모든 게 시작됐다고 말씀하셨었죠, 엔젤. 그건 무슨 뜻인가요?

1000642943.english: Your ability to read emotions—can you read them even when the other person is unconscious? Like a Guardian that has stopped functioning, for instance.
1000642943.korean: 네 감정을 읽는 능력, 상대방의 의식이 없을 때도 읽을 수 있나? 이를테면 작동을 멈춘 수호자라던가.

1000642945.english: Suddenly, emotions welled up around me...! Even though there was nothing there!

1000642946.english: As expected, it was a trap.

1000642947.english: It was strange that there were no enemies near Babel. It had stopped functioning until we arrived.
1000642947.korean: 바벨과 가까운 곳에 적이 없는 게 이상했어요. 우리가 올 때까지 기능을 멈추고 있었던 거예요.

1000642949.english: Come, you who turn your backs on the light and serve darkness. Until this body perishes and returns to the embrace of the light, I will condemn even one more of you.
1000642949.korean: 와라, 빛을 등지고 어둠을 섬기는 자들이여. 이 한몸 스러져 빛의 품으로 돌아갈 때까지 네놈들을 하나라도 더 단죄해주마.

1000642951.english: The enemies are an irrational rabble, a bunch of lacking leadership!
1000642951.korean: 적들은 이성이 없는 오합지졸, 지휘 개체가 없는 조무래기들이다!

1000642953.english: The enemy has no strategy. Use them as cover and attack!
1000642953.korean: 전략이 없는 적들이다, 놈들을 엄폐물 삼아 공격하라!

1000642955.english: I understand how you feel, but please calm down.

1000642956.english: No matter how many grunt soldiers they are dealing with, if the commander is injured, the allies will be shaken.
1000642956.korean: 아무리 잡졸을 상대한다 해도 대장이 부상을 입으면 아군이 동요할터.

1000642957.english: It's going to be a long fight.

1000642959.english: But isn't that strange? Those Iron Bugs.

1000642960.english: Even though there is no commanding body, that is too reckless.
1000642960.korean: 아무리 지휘 개체가 없다고는 하나, 너무 저돌적이군.

1000642961.english: I agree with you. In all the times I have fought against them, I have never seen such behavior.
1000642961.korean: 소관도 그리 생각하오. 지금껏 저들과 싸워오면서, 이런 행동은 본 적이 없소.

1000642962.english: But... now is not the time to think about that.
1000642962.korean: 하지만... 지금은 그런걸 생각할 때가 아니지.

1000642963.english: That is correct. Now that Your Excellency is in danger, all that remains is to follow orders and deal with the enemy right in front of us.
1000642963.korean: 맞는 말이다. 각하께서 위험에 빠진 지금, 그저 명령에 따라 눈 앞의 적을 처리하면 될 뿐.

1000642966.english: After Yong and Mari joined, the battle situation gradually improved.
1000642966.korean: - 용과 마리가 합류한 뒤, 전황이 조금씩 나아졌다.

1000642967.english: The front-line troops who had been unable to relieve themselves due to the urgent situation were sent to the rear to rest.
1000642967.korean: - 급박한 상황 때문에 교대하지 못하고 있던 전선의 대원들을 후방으로 돌리고 휴식을 취하도록 했다.

1000642968.english: Shouldn't you get some rest too?

1000642969.english: We need to wrap up this battle as quickly as possible so we can send additional reinforcements to the members isolated at the Kohei Cult branch.
1000642969.korean: - 조금이라도 빨리 이쪽의 전투를 매듭지어야 코헤이 교단의 지부에 고립되어 있을 대원들에게 추가로 지원군을 보낼 수 있겠지.

1000642970.english: Just as I was checking on the condition of the wounded and trying to contact Yong and Mari, a communication came in.
1000642970.korean: - 부상병들의 상태를 확인하고 용과 마리에게 연락하려고 할 때, 마침 통신이 걸려왔다.

1000642971.english: Your Excellency, I am reporting an emergency situation.

1000642972.english: Currently, unidentified Iron Bug have appeared on the central front.
1000642972.korean: 현재 중앙 전선에 정보가 없는 철충이 나타났습니다.

1000642973.english: Based on my experience, it does not appear to be a connected entity.

1000642974.english: It would be best to check it yourself.

1000642975.english: Is it a unique individual? It's unbelievably tough and powerful.
1000642975.korean: 특이 개체인가. 말도 안 되게 단단하고 강력하군.
